goal: Ship `huuma skills add --path=<github-url> [--force]` that installs a skill from a public GitHub repo into `<cwd>/.agents/skills/<name>/`, validated against the Agent Skills spec, with a content-hash manifest and stage-then-swap atomicity.

status_legend.blocked: waiting on a dependency or a user decision
status_legend.done: implemented and verified per the `verify` command

tasks.title: Dependencies and tooling
tasks.summary: Add @std/cli, @std/tar, @std/front-matter, @std/yaml to deno.json imports and bump the test task with --allow-net --allow-write. Foundation step; no code yet.
tasks.verify: deno task check passes; deno.lock contains the new @std entries.

tasks.title: yellow helper in src/terminal.ts
tasks.summary: Add a `yellow` ANSI helper next to red/green/dim and export it. Extend terminal_test.ts with an assertion. Leaf module; only consumed for warning rendering downstream.

tasks.title: Path grammar: src/skills/path.ts
tasks.summary: Pure URL parser/validator for `https://github.com/<owner>/<repo>/tree/<ref>[/<subpath>]`. Exports ParsedPath, Source, parsePath, formatSource, codeloadUrl, PathParseError. Rejects shorthand, slash-in-ref, blob/, .git, non-https, non-github.com.
tasks.verify: deno test src/skills/path_test.ts passes; all ADR examples behave as the ADR says.

tasks.title: SKILL.md validation: src/skills/validate.ts
tasks.summary: Pure module. Uses @std/front-matter + @std/yaml. Rejects hard on 4 mandatory invariants (SKILL.md present; name regex ^[a-z0-9]+(-[a-z0-9]+)*$ length 1-64; name == skill dir basename; description 1-1024). Warns on optional-field violations. Returns warnings to caller.
tasks.verify: deno test src/skills/validate_test.ts passes (every mandatory reject + every optional warn).

tasks.title: Manifest: src/skills/manifest.ts
tasks.summary: Owns .agents/skills/.manifest.json. Exports ManifestEntry, Manifest, readManifest, writeManifest (atomic via tmp+rename), contentHashOf (SHA-256 over sorted path+bytes), findCollision (pure: none|same-source|different-source), detectLocalEdits (disk re-hash). Imports Source from path.ts.
tasks.verify: deno test src/skills/manifest_test.ts passes (round-trip; pure findCollision 3 outcomes; detectLocalEdits true/false; hash stable; hash changes on edit).

tasks.title: Tarball extract + safety guards: src/skills/extract.ts
tasks.summary: Pure module over a ReadableStream<Uint8Array> (decompressed tarball). @std/tar Untar; strip top dir segment; keep only entries under <subpath>/; write to destDir. Three guards: path-traversal reject, symlinks skipped, size cap (total + per-file). Does NOT check SKILL.md presence (validate.ts owns that). Exports SIZE_CAP.
tasks.verify: deno test src/skills/extract_test.ts passes; each guard fires on its probe (traversal, symlink, per-file cap, total cap, subpath filter, shortsha top dir). In-memory tarballs only — no testdata/tarballs/.

tasks.title: Fetch: src/skills/fetch.ts
tasks.summary: Thin network wrapper. downloadTarball(url) -> fetch codeload URL, redirect:follow, throw FetchError on non-2xx (404 => ref not found) and on network error, return response.body.pipeThrough(new DecompressionStream("gzip")). Optional withTimeout.
tasks.verify: deno test src/skills/fetch_test.ts passes online and offline (offline skips only the live test). Offline uses Deno.serve + in-memory gzipped tarball.

tasks.title: Filesystem helpers: src/skills/fs_utils.ts
tasks.summary: Pure FS utilities extracted from the orchestrator. sweepStaleTemps (remove .tmp-*/.old-*, swallow errors), swapDirectory (stage-then-swap with rollback-on-failure), randomSuffix. No dependencies on other skills/* modules.
tasks.verify: deno test src/skills/fs_utils_test.ts passes (sweep leaves skills/manifest untouched; sweep on missing dir no-throw; swap into empty target; swap over existing; rollback restores on second-rename failure).

tasks.title: Install orchestrator: src/skills/install.ts
tasks.summary: The join point. installSkill({ parsed, force, cwd, fetch? }) wires path/validate/manifest/extract/fetch/fs_utils. Stages into .tmp-<rand>/, validates, runs the collision decision matrix (findCollision + detectLocalEdits + force), swapDirectory, updates manifest, returns { name, target, warnings }. fetch is a test seam defaulting to downloadTarball. Only add.ts imports this.
tasks.verify: deno test src/skills/install_test.ts passes (fresh install; same-source overwrite; different-source refuse; different-source --force; local-edits refuse; local-edits --force; validation failure cleans temp; traversal aborts). Uses the fetch seam + in-memory tarball — no live network, no Deno.serve.

tasks.title: add subcommand: src/skills/add.ts
tasks.summary: Arg parsing via @std/cli parseArgs (--path string required, --force boolean, --help/-h). Exports runAdd(args, deps?) where deps.fetch threads to installSkill; default export calls runAdd(args). Renders dim progress (delegated), green success, yellow warnings, red errors with Deno.exitCode=1. addHelp() mirrors project --help format.
tasks.verify: deno test src/skills/add_test.ts passes (--help/-h usage; missing --path exit 1; bad URL PathParseError rendered; unknown option; runAdd with in-memory fetch renders green and threads --force).

tasks.title: Parent skills command: src/skills/skills.ts
tasks.summary: Mirror src/project/project.ts. Owns a Registry of sub-commands; registers add first. Empty args or --help/-h => skillsHelp() listing sub-commands. Unknown sub-command => red error + help, exit 1.
tasks.verify: deno test src/skills/skills_test.ts passes (skills[] help; --help/-h help; skills add --help delegates; skills bogus red exit 1).

tasks.title: Wire skills into src/mod.ts
tasks.summary: import skills from ./skills/skills.ts; add { names: ["skills"], description: "Manage skills for your project", command: skills } to defaultCommands. No short alias. help() picks it up via registry.all().
tasks.verify: deno run -A src/mod.ts --help shows a skills row; deno run -A src/mod.ts skills --help shows skills help; deno run -A src/mod.ts skills add --help shows add help.

tasks.title: README: skills command + Skills section
tasks.summary: Add a `skills` row to the Commands table. Add a ## Skills section after ## AI Agent: intro referencing the Agent Skills spec, `huuma skills add --path=...` usage, the accepted URL grammar, the two ADR examples, and notes (public repos only v1; --force for collision/local-edits; installs into .agents/skills/). Independent of code; can land any time but logically last.
tasks.verify: Visual review; deno task test still green.

final_validation: deno task check — type-check the whole tree.
deno task test — full suite, online and offline.
Manual smoke: deno run -A src/mod.ts skills add --path=https://github.com/anthropics/skills/tree/main/skills/mcp-builder => progress + green ✓ + .agents/skills/mcp-builder/SKILL.md + manifest entry.
Re-run same command => same-source overwrite succeeds.
Edit .agents/skills/mcp-builder/SKILL.md, re-run => local-edits refuse; re-run with --force => overwrites.
Bad path (owner/repo shorthand) => red error, exit 1, no files written.
open_questions: Should .agents/ be gitignored by huuma project scaffolds (runtime artifacts) or committed (reproducible team agent behavior)?
If .agents/ is committed, the manifest should be committed too (so update can detect drift); if ignored, it is per-developer state.
When to schedule huuma skills update / list / remove?
